title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DHL India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at DHL India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!
